entries.source: "Explain black holes simply"
entries.value: "कृष्णविवरे सोप्या भाषेत समजावून सांगा"

entries.source: "Help me understand photosynthesis"
entries.value: "प्रकाशसंश्लेषण समजून घ्यायला मदत करा"

entries.source: "Teach me how interest works"
entries.value: "interest कसे काम करते ते शिकवा"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: foundations learning साठी inspir वर Learn Anything वापरण्याचा practical guide, prompts, study loops आणि सुरक्षित AI habits सह.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अधिक मजबूत study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer ऐवजी छोटी पहिली पायरी मागा.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI ला फक्त result नव्हे, तुमचे reasoning check करायला सांगा.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: जिज्ञासू शिकणारे, विद्यार्थी, पालक आणि स्वतःहून शिकणारे निर्माते ज्यांना सुरुवात करण्यासाठी एक मैत्रीपूर्ण जागा हवी आहे.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory मधून idea परत लिहून finish करा.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: पायाभूत गोष्टी

entries.source: Get examples at your level.
entries.value: तुमच्या level नुसार examples मिळवा.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: केवळ एक लांबलचक उत्तर देण्याऐवजी, inspir तुम्हाला एक सोपा पाया, सखोल मार्ग किंवा व्यावहारिक उदाहरण निवडण्यास मदत करते.

entries.source: Learn Anything
entries.value: काहीही शिका

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: absolutely anything बद्दल curious आहात? विचारा, explore करा आणि तुमच्या pace ने deeper जा. तुमचा buddy ideas practical, memorable आणि build करायला easy करतो. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: शिका Anything सह a मोफत AI शिक्षक: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question.
entries.value: useful next question घेऊन leave करा.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Try करण्यासाठी prompts

entries.source: Start the live mode at Learn Anything. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Socratic Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Learn Anything वर live mode सुरू करा. neighboring learning format हवा असल्यास Socratic Instruction try करा. platform च्या broader view साठी AI learning companion सर्वांसाठी काय करायला हवा ते वाचा.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: तुम्ही काय learn किंवा produce करण्याचा प्रयत्न करत आहात ते mode ला सांगा.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: तो difference flow मध्ये दिसतो. one giant response ऐवजी best sessions loop मधून जातात: goal set करा, काहीतरी try करा, feedback मिळवा, weak spot repair करा आणि next action choose करा.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: तो focus महत्त्वाचा आहे. general chatbot जवळजवळ काहीही answer करू शकतो, पण learning mode conversation ला shape देतो. idea stick व्हायला मदत करणाऱ्या thinking, practice, feedback किंवा exploration कडे तो nudge करतो.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: AI सोबत स्वतःला न फसवता study करण्यामागचीही हीच सवय आहे: learner active ठेवा. AI तुमच्या thinking वर feedback देते तेव्हा ते सर्वात उपयोगी ठरते.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: हा mode विशेषतः त्या learners साठी उपयोगी आहे जे करू इच्छितात:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: step तुमच्या स्वतःच्या शब्दांत try करा.

entries.source: Understand the core idea.
entries.value: core idea समजून घ्या.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Learn Anything वापरा जेव्हा तुम्हाला session पटकन सुरू व्हावे पण तरीही ते तुमच्यानुसार adapt व्हावे असे वाटते. पहिले ध्येय प्रभावी वाटणे नाही. पहिले ध्येय पुढचा step शक्य वाटायला लावणे आहे.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: हा mode कशात मदत करतो

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: पुढे कुठे जायचे

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तुमच्या real problem च्या rough version नेही तुम्ही सुरू करू शकता. messy first prompt ठीक आहे. तुम्ही सुरू केल्यावर session level, audience, deadline आणि style स्पष्ट करू शकते.
